API Reference

This section provides auto-generated documentation for every public module in fkcompute. The documentation is extracted from the source docstrings using Sphinx autodoc.

  • fkcompute — Top-Level API
    • Main Computation Function
    • Batch and Config-File Functions
    • Presets
    • Domain Types
    • Constraint Classes
    • Symbolic Output
    • fkcompute.api
  • fkcompute.domain — Braid and Constraint Domain
    • fkcompute.domain.braid
    • fkcompute.domain.constraints
    • fkcompute.domain.solver
  • fkcompute.inversion — Sign Assignment Search
    • Entry Point
    • Result Type
    • Braid Type Detection
    • Parallel Search
    • Braid Variants
    • Permutation Candidates
    • Sign Validation
  • fkcompute.solver — ILP Generation
    • ILP Generation
    • Gurobi Integration
    • ILP File Format
  • fkcompute.output — Symbolic Formatting
    • fkcompute.output.symbolic
  • fkcompute.infra — Infrastructure
    • fkcompute.infra.binary
    • fkcompute.infra.config
    • fkcompute.infra.io
  • fkcompute.interactive — Interactive Wizard
    • Invoking the Wizard
    • Module Reference

Module Summary

Module

Description

fkcompute

Top-level public API: fk(), presets, and re-exports.

fkcompute.api

High-level computation functions and batch processing.

fkcompute.domain

Pure domain logic: braid topology, state systems, and constraints.

fkcompute.inversion

Sign assignment search (Phase 1 of the pipeline).

fkcompute.solver

ILP formulation and Gurobi integration (Phase 2).

fkcompute.output

Symbolic polynomial formatting using SymPy.

fkcompute.infra

Infrastructure: binary execution, config I/O.

fkcompute.interactive

Rich-based interactive wizard (optional dependency).
